project.description: VoiceForge TTS Platform — CI/CD Freestyle Job

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -e
echo "================================================" echo " VoiceForge Build #${BUILD_NUMBER}" echo " Branch : ${GIT_BRANCH}" echo " Commit : ${GIT_COMMIT:0:8}" echo "================================================"
# ── BACKEND ────────────────────────────────────────── echo "" echo ">>> BACKEND: Install" cd backend python3 -m venv venv . venv/bin/activate pip install --upgrade pip --quiet pip install -r requirements.txt --quiet pip install ruff --quiet
echo "" echo ">>> BACKEND: Lint" ruff check app/ tests/ ruff format --check app/ tests/
echo "" echo ">>> BACKEND: Tests" export DATABASE_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:///./test.db export REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379/0 export CELERY_BROKER_URL=redis://localhost:6379/0 export CELERY_RESULT_BACKEND=redis://localhost:6379/1 export ENV=test pytest tests/ --junitxml=test-results.xml --cov=app -v
echo "✅ Backend passed"
# ── FRONTEND ───────────────────────────────────────── echo "" echo ">>> FRONTEND: Install" cd ../frontend npm ci --silent
echo "" echo ">>> FRONTEND: Lint" npm run lint
echo "" echo ">>> FRONTEND: Build" npm run build echo "Bundle size: $(du -sh dist/)"
echo "✅ Frontend passed" echo "" echo "================================================" echo " ✅ ALL STEPS PASSED" echo "================================================"

email.subject: ❌ [VoiceForge] Build #$BUILD_NUMBER FAILED — $GIT_BRANCH
email.body:
❌ Build Failed

Build: #$BUILD_NUMBER

Branch: $GIT_BRANCH

Commit: $GIT_COMMIT

Duration: $BUILD_DURATION

View Console Output

email.subject: ✅ [VoiceForge] Build #$BUILD_NUMBER PASSED — $GIT_BRANCH
email.body:
✅ Build Passed

Build: #$BUILD_NUMBER

Branch: $GIT_BRANCH

Duration: $BUILD_DURATION

View Build

email.subject: ✅ [VoiceForge] Build #$BUILD_NUMBER FIXED — $GIT_BRANCH
email.body: Build is back to passing after previous failure. See: $BUILD_URL
